inputs.fcf_source: Recurring quarterly distribution $0.75/unit × 4 (FY2025 run rate; excludes March 2025 $1.21 special tax distribution) — 10-K_20260227
inputs.book_source: Partners capital $632.5M / 13.25M units at 3/31/2026 (approx.; not fair-value floor)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence uses declared common-unit distributions, not GAAP net income. Soda Ash equity distributions collapsed in 2025–Q1 2026; base uses recurring $0.75/qtr only.

bear.notes: Coal royalty volumes/prices stay weak; $0.75/qtr cut; Sisecam Wyoming distributions minimal

base.notes: Flat $3.00/unit recurring distributions; debt service on ~$60M revolver; soda ash option not in base cash

bull.notes: Met coal stabilizes; Sisecam distributions resume; carbon/renewable lease option adds incremental royalty

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Mineral rights net $380M + equity method Sisecam $276M on balance sheet; ~13M acre footprint not marked to fair NAV (10-K_20260227)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 13M acres mineral interests; coal/oil/gas/carbon sequestration leases largely undeveloped vs current run-rate (10-K Business)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 49% non-controlling interest in Sisecam Wyoming; Q1 2026 $39.2M capital contribution; distributions paused (10-Q_20260506)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Revenues down from $370M (2023) to $207M (2025); distributions cut to $0.75/qtr from higher 2023 levels; debt refinanced

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Producing coal royalties ~99% of segment revenue; soda ash equity cash in segment when paid

optionality_gate.notes: Recurring yield ~3% at ~$95; asset floor from mineral book + Sisecam stake; Lawrence base below 15% bar — size for optionality not core

nav_overlay.fair_nav_note: Mineral rights carried at cost/depletion; 13M-acre portfolio not fully marked. Do not use GAAP book alone as dhando floor.

options.label: Undeveloped / carbon / renewable mineral leases
options.base_terminal_rationale: No filing fair-value mark for undeveloped 13M-acre option; explicit zero in Lawrence base after scan
options.evidence: 10-K_20260227 Business — carbon sequestration and renewable energy lease option cited; not in run-rate distributions

options.label: Sisecam Wyoming distribution recovery
options.base_terminal_rationale: Q1 2026 zero distribution; $39.2M contribution — recovery timing uncertain; zero in base Lawrence FCF

segments.label: Mineral Rights (coal, oil/gas, aggregates)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $204.2M; distributions primarily from coal royalties (10-K_20260227)

segments.label: Soda Ash (49% Sisecam Wyoming)
segments.evidence: FY2025 segment revenue $3.1M; equity distributions collapsed vs prior years (10-K_20260227)

options.label: Sisecam Wyoming cash distribution recovery
options.base_terminal_rationale: Not in Lawrence base until distributions resume in filings

growth_explanation.mechanism: Base assumes flat $0.75 quarterly distribution. Upside requires met coal price/volume stabilization on Appalachian/Illinois/Powder River leases or resumed Sisecam Wyoming distributions.
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Quarterly distribution cut below $0.60/unit for two consecutive quarters while coal revenues decline further.
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Sisecam distributions resume above $15M annual run-rate to NRP plus stable $0.75/qtr on coal royalties.

paths.label: Lawrence base (recurring distributions)
paths.weight_why: No approved third-party sources; recurring distribution path only.
